title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer (FinOps) - Platform
score_reasoning: You are a solid candidate for this Senior SRE Platform role at Elastic in Spain. Your 7 years building distributed services, AWS infrastructure expertise (ECS, S3, SQS), Terraform IaC experience, Docker containerization, and proven incident management & reliability focus (40% MTTR improvement via observability) align well with the platform engineering and operational excellence mandate. The Senior title matches your level, and Spain's timezone (±1h from Berlin) plus the implicit remote flexibility suit your location preferences. The bonus points on Kubernetes-at-scale and multi-cloud operations are gaps—you lack Kubernetes hands-on experience and multi-cloud diversity—but the role emphasizes SRE perspective and platform reliability over Kubernetes expertise. Your experience with infrastructure automation, distributed team collaboration, and cost/reliability tradeoffs is relevant to FinOps framing. Growth potential is moderate to good: platform engineering aligns with your systems thinking, though the FinOps angle (cost optimization, cloud spend) is not explicitly highlighted in your background. Overall, a viable fit with minor tech gaps.

red_flags: Kubernetes-at-scale listed as bonus; you lack Kubernetes experience (notable but not core requirement)
Multi-cloud operations preferred; your experience is AWS-focused
FinOps angle (cost optimization, cloud spend metrics) not evident in your background
Bonus points on Golang programs and Elastic Stack experience—you have Go but limited Elastic Stack usage
